steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
Using the table points $(-6,65)$ and $(6,29)$, the slope is
$$
\frac{29-65}{6-(-6)}=\frac{-36}{12}=-3
$$

steps.title: Find the linear equation
steps.content:
Use $y=-3x+b$ and the point $(6,29)$.
$$
29=-3(6)+b
$$
$$
b=47
$$
So the equation is $y=-3x+47$.

steps.title: Match the answer form
steps.content: Rewrite the equation in the form used by the choices. $$ y=-3x+47 $$ $$ 3x+y=47 $$ $$ 9x+3y=141 $$ The answer is A.
